name: fairmind-coding
description: Coding workflow plugin: 6 role-based agents (Technical Lead, Software Engineer, Code Reviewer, QA Engineer, Debugging Specialist, Security Engineer), 11 skills (frontend/backend/AI + gate layer), 8 hooks (6 workspace + 2 ambient insight-capture), and 17 commands (loop, develop, gate authoring, harness audit, insights sync, fix/migrate/PR helpers). Adds a loop mode: a machine-checkable stop condition with an executed gate, RED-first maker-not-checker authoring, admission, and a final human gate. Runs standalone on any repo (zero-config); Fairmind, Playwright and MongoDB MCP are optional and only enable connected mode.
